content:
# Gradient Flow Analysis v21

## Architecture
Transformer-12L

## Flow Metrics
- Vanishing gradient score: 0.624
- Exploding gradient score: 0.686
- Effective depth: 85 layers

## Optimizations Applied
- Attention gating
- Residual connections
- Layer normalization
- Attention gating

## Recommendation
Increase learning rate in early layers.
